abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not a verified supported model.

error.invalid_address: Enter a Bluetooth address in XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX form.
error.invalid_serial: Enter the full C5500XK or C6500XK serial advertised by the SmartNID.

confirm.description: Add this discovered Quantum Fiber SmartNID? Connections use Home Assistant Bluetooth, including connectable ESPHome proxies. C6500XK support is experimental and read-only. Operational write controls remain disabled by default.
confirm.title: Quantum Fiber SmartNID

user.description: Enter the ONT identity if its short Bluetooth advertising window is currently closed. A connectable Home Assistant Bluetooth proxy must see a fresh advertisement before monitoring can connect.
user.title: Quantum Fiber SmartNID

init.description: Write buttons are disabled entities and unavailable unless explicitly enabled here. Enabling does not press them. Operational writes remain blocked for experimental C6500XK devices.
init.title: SmartNID options
